title: Tiered More
description: Fork of Globox_Z's TieredZ that adds some QoL things & Accessories Modifiers!
body: This is a fork of [Globox\_Z's TieredZ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tieredz) that adds my own spice to the mod! Be sure to support the original creators [Globox\_Z](https://www.curseforge.com/members/globox_z/projects) and [Draylar1](https://www.curseforge.com/members/draylar1/projects)! # New features: * A list of modifiers on the side (toggleable) & able to see what bonuses the modifiers add * Able to choose a modifier as the target and reforge until you get that modifier * Accessories are now able to get tiers as well! * Added Tuning Ingots for group specific modifiers! * Added excluding certain items or tags from receiving specific modifiers * Added optional Cursed modifiers (Can no longer be reforged and can be Uncursed via Blessed Scroll) * Able to add spells to modifiers! Here is the showcase of the new QoL & Accessories Compat: # Mod used to show attributes: * [Kev's Attributes Panel](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kevs-attributes-panel)
